menu_sections.special_subtitle: Something to put in the centre of the table
menu_sections.pistoccu_subtitle: The one and only traditional Pistoccu, only at Scivedda
menu_sections.scivedde_subtitle: The Sardinian Scivedda — tradition meets other cultures
menu_sections.culurgionis_subtitle: Pan-roasted Culurgionis, always and only handmade
menu_sections.dolcetti_subtitle: Our sweet treats, fruit and a few after-dinner bites

menu_items.hummus-polpette_desc: Chickpea hummus, yogurt and lemon, vegan soy and chard meatballs, walnuts, fresh onion and sweet paprika.
menu_items.civraxu-crudo-mare_desc: Civraxu bread crostino, guacamole, Philadelphia cream cheese and raw salmon, teriyaki, sesame.
menu_items.civraxu-orto_desc: Civraxu, fresh goat's cheese cream, Pula cherry tomatoes and basil, seasonal vegetables.
menu_items.crudi-giorno_desc: Daily seafood tartare (150g), seasonal fruit, Pula cherry tomatoes, teriyaki, sesame.
menu_items.guttiau-chips_desc: Pane Guttiau chips, homemade guacamole, raw salmon and spicy mayo.
menu_items.pistoccu-maialetto_desc: Slow-cooked pulled pork roasted for a full day, guacamole with cucumber, onion and sun-dried tomato, Ricotta Mustia, Pula cherry tomatoes and cucumber, teriyaki and spicy mayonnaise.
menu_items.pistoccu-polletto_desc: Free-range Sardinian chicken from Terralba, teriyaki sauce, guacamole with cucumber, red onion and sun-dried tomato, Parteolla olives, steamed seasonal vegetables, lightly spicy mayonnaise and walnuts.
menu_items.pistoccu-polpo_desc:
Mediterranean octopus and daily raw fish tartare on homemade guacamole with onion, cucumber and sun-dried tomato, seasonal vegetables. Traditional octopus with olive oil, garlic, parsley and fresh lemon.

*Some products may be treated at sub-zero temperatures to ensure maximum freshness and food safety.
menu_items.pistoccu-veg_desc:
Homemade fresh avocado guacamole with onion, cucumber and sun-dried tomato, steamed seasonal vegetables, daily vegetable and legume meatballs, teriyaki and Philadelphia cream cheese, crispy onion chips and sesame.

*Some products may be treated at sub-zero temperatures to ensure maximum freshness and food safety.
menu_items.pistoccu-crudi-mare_desc:
Daily raw catch, homemade guacamole with onion, cucumber and sun-dried tomato, seasonal fruit, fresh mango, soy sauce and teriyaki.

*Some products are treated at sub-zero temperatures to ensure maximum quality and food safety.
menu_items.scivedda-polletto_desc: Oristano white rice, shredded and marinated free-range chicken from Terralba, teriyaki sauce, sweetcorn, Parteolla olives, Pula cherry tomatoes, fresh fennel carpaccio, caramelised onion, Philadelphia cream cheese, sesame.
menu_items.scivedda-polletto_warning: ⚠️ Parteolla artisan olives are pitted, however some stones may still be present — please take care!
menu_items.scivedda-tabule_desc: Toasted Fregula salad, fine mirepoix of sweet red onion and cucumber, mint, basil, seasonal fruit, Pula cherry tomatoes, walnuts, salt and olive oil.
menu_items.scivedda-tabule_suggestion: We suggest adding the daily tartare — select the option below
menu_items.scivedda-sarda_desc: White rice, fresh salmon, avocado, wakame, cucumber, soy sauce and sesame seeds. Our classic.
menu_items.scivedda-piccante_desc: Tuna, mango, red onion, carrots, spicy mayo, crispy onion and lime. Just the right amount of heat.
menu_items.scivedda-pollo_desc: Teriyaki chicken on brown rice with avocado, sweetcorn, carrots, teriyaki sauce and pickled ginger.
menu_items.scivedda-veggie_desc: 100% plant-based: marinated tofu, quinoa, avocado, mango, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, ponzu and nori.
menu_items.scivedda-tropical_desc: Prawns, mango, pineapple, cucumber, ponzu, tobiko and lime. A journey to the tropics.
menu_items.culurgionis-classici_desc: Ogliastra-style Culurgionis, filled with potato, mint and pecorino cheese, pan-roasted with butter and sage. Handmade every morning.
menu_items.culurgionis-cinghiale_desc: Handmade roasted Culurgionis with slow Sardinian wild boar ragù, myrtle and juniper berries.
menu_items.culurgionis-bottarga_desc: Potato and mint Culurgionis, roasted, with grated grey mullet Bottarga, olive oil and lemon. The sea on a plate.
menu_items.panedda-salmone_desc: Toasted soft Sardinian bread, marinated salmon, smashed avocado, cucumber, red onion and ponzu sauce. Fresh and flavourful.
menu_items.panedda-porchetta_desc: Toasted semolina bread with freshly sliced Sardinian porchetta, wild rocket, cherry tomato and lemon mayonnaise.
menu_items.panedda-tonno_desc: Softened pane carasau, yellowfin tuna, green olives, Pantelleria capers, cherry tomato and wild oregano.
menu_items.panedda-culurgionis_desc: Open semolina bread, halved roasted Culurgionis, melted pecorino, rocket and myrtle reduction. Our signature dish.
menu_items.panedda-veggie_desc: Toasted rye bread, Sardinian chickpea hummus, grilled vegetables, avocado, baby spinach and lemon tahini. 100% plant-based.
menu_items.seadas_desc: Freshly fried Sardinian seada, filled with tangy fresh cheese, drizzled with bitter strawberry-tree honey. Crispy outside, soft inside.
menu_items.formagelle_desc: Fresh sheep's cheese with Sardinian wildflower honey and toasted walnuts.
menu_items.frutta_desc: Fresh seasonal fruit, selected every morning. Cleaned, sliced and ready to enjoy.
menu_items.pistoccu-dolce_desc: Pistoccu with Sardinian almond cream, honey and orange zest. A light and fragrant after-dinner treat.
menu_items.mirto_desc: Traditional Sardinian myrtle liqueur, served ice cold. The best way to end the meal.
menu_items.vernaccia_desc: The quintessential Sardinian white wine — dry and amber-hued. Perfect as an aperitif or with fish.
menu_items.cannonau_desc: Full-bodied and warm, rich in polyphenols. The wine of Sardinian longevity.
menu_items.te-freddo_desc: Homemade iced tea, lemon or peach. No added sugar.
menu_items.caffe_desc: Espresso, macchiato or Americano. Artisanally roasted Sardinian blend.
